description: Task catalog — defines available maintenance tasks, their intent, required capabilities, and output types

items.name: Pipeline Bottleneck Finder
runbook: Scan .axion/runs/ for completed pipeline runs
Parse stage reports for started_at / finished_at timestamps
Aggregate timing across most recent 10 runs
Rank stages by average elapsed time percentage
Identify top 5 hotspots exceeding 3% of total time
Compute variance to detect non-deterministic stages
Detect performance trend (improving/worsening/stable)
Generate hypotheses for each bottleneck
Emit bottleneck report, insights, findings, and recommendations

items.name: Detail Depth Opportunities
runbook: Load rendered docs from latest pipeline run
For each document measure word count, section count, heading density
Check placeholder resolution rate from render_report.json
Identify documents with low depth (short sections, sparse content)
Rank documents by depth improvement potential
Emit insights with specific file references and recommendations

items.name: Template Determinism + Quality Audit
runbook: Load REG-TEMPLATES registry
Check each template for version, status, and naming compliance
Cross-reference with latest render report for unresolved placeholders
Check content hash consistency across render envelopes
Emit findings for templates with quality issues
Generate quality insight summary and recommendations

items.name: Internal Monitor
runbook: Run DP-REG-01 registry integrity checks
Validate all REG-*.json for structure, duplicates, cross-references
Count findings by severity level
Generate system health insight with confidence score
Recommend follow-up tasks based on findings

items.name: Token/Compute Waste Hotspots
runbook: Scan pipeline runs for stage timing data
Identify rerun frequency per assembly
Compute per-stage cost proportional to time
Compare content hashes across runs to find cache opportunities
Calculate per-template render cost from timing and template counts
Emit cost-focused bottleneck report with waste hotspots
Generate cost reduction recommendations

items.name: Internal Integrity / Drift Scan
runbook: Run DP-DRIFT-01 drift detection on all registries
Check for orphaned files and missing cross-references
Detect slug inconsistencies and reference mismatches
Compare current registry state against last validated state
Emit integrity findings with severity ranking
Generate drift pattern insights and fix recommendations

invariants: default_agent_id must reference a valid agent in REG-AGENTS
outputs_enabled must contain at least one output type
